title: Design: Environment-Based Folder Naming
response:
After Linus-style review, this design is over-engineered. It creates 8 new components, a validation utility that duplicates
  Google Drive API validation, and a new API endpoint to solve a problem that shouldn't exist. The root cause is the frontend
  fallback logic (useAttachmentUpload.ts lines 261-283) which creates data inconsistency and requires the hardcoded folder name.

  Request: Simplify to Option C - Delete the fallback entirely, add 1 environment variable field to EnvironmentVariableUtil,
  change 1 line in GoogleDriveClient to use the env var, and remove the fallback code from the frontend. Total: 3 files modified,
  ~30 lines deleted, 0 new files, 0 new APIs. This eliminates the special case instead of adding complexity to support it.

  File has been updated with the simplified design - please create new approval request for the revised version.
